ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals scored against the player */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Total saves made by the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins recorded by the player */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses recorded by the player */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Total ties recorded by the player */,
  "shutouts" INTEGER /* Total shutouts recorded by the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Goalkeeper, Defender, Midfielder, Forward) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player (e.g., Healthy, Injured) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "contract_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "team_founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player these stats pertain to */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season for these stats */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Goals against recorded in the season */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Total saves made during the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Wins recorded in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Losses recorded in the season */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Ties recorded in the season */,
  "shutouts" INTEGER /* Shutouts recorded in the season */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player in the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player in the season */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player in the season */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player in the season */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player these metrics refer to */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season for these metrics */,
  "gaa" REAL /* Goals Against Average calculated for the player */,
  "sv_percentage" REAL /* Save Percentage calculated for the player */,
  "shutouts" INTEGER /* Total shutouts recorded in the season */,
  "goals_scored_average" REAL /* Average number of goals scored per game */,
  "assists_average" REAL /* Average number of assists per game */,
  "yellow_cards_average" REAL /* Average number of yellow cards per game */,
  "red_cards_average" REAL /* Average number of red cards per game */,
  "minutes_played_average" REAL /* Average minutes played per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game log entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with this log */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game played */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (Win, Loss, Tie) */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Minutes played by the player in the game */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Total saves made by the player during the game */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Goals scored against the player in the game */,
  "opponent_team" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicator for home or away game */,
  "team_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player's team */,
  "opponent_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the opponent team */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Final result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss, Tie) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
